About ICPB

India's Premier Body for Convention Promotion

Ministry of Tourism, Govt. of India ICCA Member

India is rapidly emerging as a global hub for meetings, conferences, and events — offering a perfect blend of rich heritage and modern infrastructure. With world-class convention centres, top-tier hospitality, and seamless global connectivity, India stands as the ideal destination for the MICE industry.

At the heart of this transformation is the India Convention Promotion Bureau (ICPB) — established in 1988 and sponsored by the Ministry of Tourism, Government of India. ICPB brings together state governments, hotels, airlines, tour operators, event managers, and industry professionals to enhance India's global presence in the MICE sector.

Read More Contact Us

India offers a unique confluence of ancient culture, modern convention centres, and seamless global connectivity — making it the world's most compelling MICE destination.

Testimonials

Thank you very much for your mail and big thanks to you and ICPB for the opportunity to participate in the convention. It was very interactive has given us a platform to share our views. Hope the recommendation you have made will be accepted by GOI particularly regarding visa for delegates and help in bidding international conference.

“”
AC
Prof. Arun Chougule
Dean, Faculty of Paramedical Sciences, Rajasthan University of Health Sciences [RUHS]

This is to express my appreciation for the 2 day conference hosted by your organisation. It was well planned, well executed, theme well expressed, discussions well participated and guests looked after well. It was the first time that I participated in such an event and it was wonderful to get educated on so many issues involved in hosting a conference. The Indian Academy of Cytologists shall be making its bid in May/June 2016 to host the International Congress of Cytology in New Delhi in the year 2022. I do hope that our discussion on this project shall continue and reach a logical conclusion.

“”
DP
Dr. Dev Prasoon
Indian Academy of Cytologists

I would like to take a moment to congratulate each of the ICPB members for such a wonderful job they did during the convention. I have heard nothing but praise from all who attended the conference. The presenters were well prepared and the sessions were well attended. Everyone felt that you did a superb job organizing this event, selecting thought-provoking topics and even the hospitality was far beyond our expectation. Congratulations on both a successful and a memorable conference. You have set a new standard for conference planners. Thanks for making the conference so worthwhile.

“”
RP
Ram Pravesh
Director, Pravesh Cruising & Shipping Training Institute
